name: Partially my fault for neck injury at work, does that bar comp?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault for neck injury at work, does that bar comp?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, workers' comp no-fault; your negligence doesn't disqualify.** Benefits if work-related.[3] Key factors: Even horseplay sometimes covered; employer can't blame you. Pure comp advantage. Focus on injury facts.
